sglang.title: Improve benchmark scripts & add more models
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Support data parallelism (static)
sglang.author: Ying1123
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add built-in data parallelism support. It can give better throughput then tensor parallelism when there is enough memory.
Usage
Usage: --dp [num_replicas] and --load-balance [heuristic]
Example (data parallel = 2, tensor parallel = 2):
python -m  sglang.launch_server --model-path meta-llama/Llama-2-

vllm.title: [Core] Allow AQLM on Pascal
vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
AQLM works on Pascal.
AWQ generates gibberish (repeated exclamation mark !).
GPTQ is very slow. Even just loading Llama 3 8B takes 30 minutes. In comparison, FP16 takes 1 minute.
FP16 works fine.


AQLM
============ Serving Benchmark Result ============
Successful requests:                     1000

vllm.title: [Core] Sliding window for block manager v2
vllm.author: mmoskal
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This implements sliding window in v2 block manager.
First commit comes from #3967 by @ruthe98, but the actual change was somewhat more complex including the concept of a null block.
It passes correctness tests with starcoder3b (the smallest model with sliding window I could find). The test does a bu
